notes: Added a dedicated Spending Plan tab to Pathmark Online beta.
Added Google Sheet-backed tables for income, spending items, and cash-flow accounts.
Added cash-flow summary metrics for annual income, annual spending, weekly surplus, everyday spend, fixed costs, sinking funds, and emergency fund target.
Added starter spending categories based on the uploaded spending-plan system without hard-coding private sample values.
Updated About & Privacy wording to include spending plan records in the user's Pathmark Sync sheet.
release_notes: Adds a dedicated Spending Plan tab to Pathmark Online, with separate income, spending, and cash-flow account records saved in the user's Pathmark Sync sheet. The local desktop package is carried forward unchanged in this release.
